$pushId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['username', 'facility', 'mode', 'earnings', 'timestamp', 'uid']) && newData.child('username').isString() && newData.child('username').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('earnings').isNumber() && newData.child('earnings').val() >= -100000 && newData.child('earnings').val() <= 500000 && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid
